title: elymus distans
intro: Elymus distans, also known as slender wheatgrass or slender wildrye, is a type of grass native to Europe and Asia. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as improving gut health, reducing oxidative stress, and potentially lowering blood pressure. Elymus distans can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile addition to a natural health regimen.
